scenario:
INVITE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=tcp SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=udp Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=sip call c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 2222 RTP/AVP 18 0 8 120 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000/1 m=video 4444 RTP/AVP 97 99 111 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:2048000 a=label:1 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 m=application 1200 RTP/AVP 97 99 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=sendrecv m=application 3000 TCP/TLS/BFCP * a=setup:actpass a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 4A:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:AB a=floorctrl:s-only a=confid:4321 a=userid:1234 a=floorid:1 m-stream:10 a=floorid:2 m-stream:12
ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
#
INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq:101 INVITE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=sip call c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 2222 RTP/AVP 18 0 8 120 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000/1 m=video 4444 RTP/AVP 97 99 111 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:2048000 a=label:1 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 m=application 1200 RTP/AVP 97 99 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=sendrecv m=application 3000 TCP/TLS/BFCP * a=setup:actpass a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 4A:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:AB a=floorctrl:s-only a=confid:4321 a=userid:1234 a=floorid:1 m-stream:10 a=floorid:2 m-stream:12 m=video 4444 RTP/AVP 97 99 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:2048000 a=label:1 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=sendrecv
ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 101 ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
BYE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 103 BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
